name: news
description: Fetches raw news headlines and article content from Google News, Hacker News, Yahoo News, Substack, and Medium.
author: hagency

tools.name: news_fetch
tools.description: Fetch raw news headlines and full article content from multiple sources. Returns structured text with headlines by category and deep-fetched article content. Does NOT summarize or synthesize -- the agent should do that. Categories: politics, world/international, business/commerce, technology/tech, science, entertainment/social, health, sports.

categories.description: News categories to fetch. Empty array or omitted = all categories. Options: politics, world, international, business, commerce, technology, tech, science, entertainment, social, health, sports

language.description: Language hint passed through to the output (default: 'zh'). The tool always fetches English sources; this field tells the agent what language to use for synthesis.
